tasks.label: backend:auto-start-local-8082
args: Set-Location -Path '${workspaceFolder}\backend'; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8082 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { ($conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique) | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; & .\mvnw.cmd -f .\pom.xml spring-boot:run '-Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local' '-Dspring-boot.run.arguments=--server.port=8082'
